title: His Institution of the (Islamic) Dating System / x14 ]'Umar's] Carrying a Whip and His Instituting the State Registers
description: His Institution of the (Islamic) Dating System / x14 ]'Umar's] Carrying a Whip and His Instituting the State Registers. Recorded under the year 22 AH (643–644 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 14.
